pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5): '$39.99 USD'. Metadata stores numeric value without currency. Verifier.py (line 105) converts to float for comparison with tolerance of 0.01.

task.json description (line 5): 'The product must be published (not left in draft)'. Export_result.sh (lines 38-43) maps database status 1 to 'published', 0 to 'unpublished'. Verifier.py (line 119) performs exact string match.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata values have been verified as correctly representing the task specification. The task requires creating a product with the title 'Organic Bamboo Wireless Charger', SKU 'OBW-CHR-01', price $39.99, and published status. These are synthetic task specifications, not claims about real-world product data. The metadata values are accurately transcribed from the task.json description, hardcoded in the export_result.sh verification script, and correctly validated by the verifier.py logic using float comparison for price (tolerance 0.01) and case-insensitive title matching.
